functions.name: SetNodeLocation

functions.name: FindOrCreateGraphInputMetadata
functions.description: Find graph input metadata (which includes editor only range information for floats) for a given input. If the metadata does not exist, create it.

functions.description: Add a builder listener for a builder which is used to add and remove custom editor builder delegates.
